description_long: This is a modern, two-seater sofa with a deep blue fabric upholstery and a sleek, geometric design. The sofa features two large, loose seat cushions and two matching backrest cushions, all of which are uniform in size and shape. The armrests are straight, boxy, and extend to the same height as the backrest, creating a clean-lined silhouette. The base and legs are constructed from a contrasting light-colored material, likely metal, with a sled-style support that adds a contemporary touch. The upholstery appears to have a subtle geometric pattern, giving the surface a textured visual interest. Overall, the sofa exudes a sophisticated, urban aesthetic suitable for public or semi-public spaces.
description: A modern blue two-seater sofa with boxy armrests, geometric patterned upholstery, and a light-colored sled base.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large seat and back cushions, straight armrests, and the full width of the sofa.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the boxy armrest, the thickness of the seat cushion, and the sled-style leg design.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest and the geometric upholstery pattern across the back.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the armrest and the light-colored base, mirroring the other side.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, loose seat cushions and two matching loose backrest cushions, all uniform in size and placed side by side.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, boxy armrests at the same height as the backrest, with a geometric profile and no visible padding or decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Sled-style legs made of light-colored metal, running along the base with central support, exposed and visually distinct from the upholstery.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight backrest with two loose cushions, continuous across the width of the sofa, no tufting or segmentation.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Subtle geometric pattern in the blue fabric, providing a textured visual effect without decorative stitching or tufting.
